contract.payment_cadence: per ordering period; platforms at delivery; services upon completion/acceptance
documents: drive://(1305M226D0012) Attachment 2-Schedule of Items and Prices_1305M226D0012.pdf

line_items.description: Black Swift S0 sUAS Platforms (675 units across 5 ordering periods at escalating unit prices: $18,000–$20,655)
Mission Days Operational support (150 days across 5 periods at $2,850/day)
Operational and Testing Support (30 sessions across 5 periods at $6,000/session)
Operator and Observer Training Sessions (5 sessions at $6,000 each)
Instructor Training Sessions (5 sessions at $600 each)
Travel for Operational Support (5 periods × $50,000 NTE)
Technical Documentation of Software and Hardware Development NRE (5 periods × $66,000 NTE)
Non-recurring Engineering National Hurricane Center operational workflow integration (5 periods × $66,000 NTE)
